testcase.name: test_public_pacs_endpoint

failure.message: AssertionError: assert False + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'ano': '2026', 'codigo_classificacao': None, 'created_at': '2025-12-10T21:21:16.608000', 'email': 'educacao@acaiaca.mg.gov.br', ...}, {'ano': '2026', 'codigo_classificacao': None, 'created_at': '2025-12-10T21:21:26.997000', 'email': 'saude@acaiaca.mg.gov.br', ...}, {'ano': '2026', 'codigo_classificacao': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-05T11:48:16.466000', 'email': 'andrea.souza@acaiaca.mg.gov.br', ...}], 'pagination': {'limit': 50, 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, 'total': 3}, 'success': True}, list)

testcase.failure: tests/test_cpf_cargo_validation.py:277: in test_public_pacs_endpoint assert isinstance(data, list) E AssertionError: assert False E + where False = isinstance({'data': [{'ano': '2026', 'codigo_classificacao': None, 'created_at': '2025-12-10T21:21:16.608000', 'email': 'educacao@acaiaca.mg.gov.br', ...}, {'ano': '2026', 'codigo_classificacao': None, 'created_at': '2025-12-10T21:21:26.997000', 'email': 'saude@acaiaca.mg.gov.br', ...}, {'ano': '2026', 'codigo_classificacao': None, 'created_at': '2026-01-05T11:48:16.466000', 'email': 'andrea.souza@acaiaca.mg.gov.br', ...}], 'pagination': {'limit': 50, 'page': 1, 'pages': 1, 'total': 3}, 'success': True}, list)
